segments.text: I will give thanks to you, Lord, with all my heart; I will tell of all your wonderful deeds.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I will be glad and rejoice in you; I will sing the praises of your name, O Most High.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: My enemies turn back; they stumble and perish before you.
For you have upheld my right and my cause, sitting enthroned as the righteous judge.
You have rebuked the nations and destroyed the wicked; you have blotted out their name for ever and ever.
Endless ruin has overtaken my enemies, you have uprooted their cities; even the memory of them has perished.
The Lord reigns forever; he has established his throne for judgment.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: He rules the world in righteousness and judges the peoples with equity.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: The Lord is a refuge for the oppressed, a stronghold in times of trouble.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Those who know your name trust in you, for you, Lord, have never forsaken those who seek you.
Sing the praises of the Lord, enthroned in Zion; proclaim among the nations what he has done.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For he who avenges blood remembers; he does not ignore the cries of the afflicted.
Lord, see how my enemies persecute me! Have mercy and lift me up from the gates of death,
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: that I may declare your praises in the gates of Daughter Zion, and there rejoice in your salvation.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: The nations have fallen into the pit they have dug; their feet are caught in the net they have hidden.
The Lord is known by his acts of justice; the wicked are ensnared by the work of their hands.
The wicked go down to the realm of the dead, all the nations that forget God.
But God will never forget the needy; the hope of the afflicted will never perish.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Arise, Lord, do not let mortals triumph; let the nations be judged in your presence.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Strike them with terror, Lord; let the nations know they are only mortal.
segments.speaker: David
